Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert S. Aaron, of Aaron Wilson LLP, Tel. 415.438.7801, for plaintiffs and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING: PLAINTIFF DIANE BRYAN Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Defendant shall provide full, complete and verified responses to the requested discovery within 10 days of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $285 to be paid with 10 days. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Continued To Sep-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

PLAINTIFF DIANE BRYAN Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is Continued to September 10, 2014, to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 28, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
